channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Digested week: Starmer’s day of reckoning was foreseen – just not the level of drama | John Crace
item.description: Digested week: Starmer’s day of reckoning was foreseen – just not the level of drama | John Crace

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs reach new high and pound falls as leadership drama continues
item.description: UK borrowing costs reach new high and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Greens suggest they will properly contest byelection in blow for Burnham
item.description: Greens suggest they will properly contest byelection in blow for Burnham

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Pound plummets to one-month low after Burnham plots PM challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Pound plummets to one-month low after Burnham plots PM challenge

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Who is Andy Burnham? The ‘King of the North’ threatening Starmer’s premiership
item.description: Who is Andy Burnham? The ‘King of the North’ threatening Starmer’s premiership

item.title: Novara Media: Andy Burnham’s Route to Power Is Anything but Easy
item.description: Andy Burnham’s Route to Power Is Anything but Easy

item.title: Bloomberg.com: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer - Bloomberg.com
item.description: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How could Labour MPs trigger a leadership contest? The threshold Streeting must meet
item.description: How could Labour MPs trigger a leadership contest? The threshold Streeting must meet

item.title: BBC Politics: First minister spent election night win at Premier Inn after forgetting his keys
item.description: First minister spent election night win at Premier Inn after forgetting his keys
